framing: Secondary school teacher transitioning to instructional designer role at EdTech startup

jd.title: Senior Instructional Designer — AI Learning Products
jd.style_note: Startup-technical: mission-driven, cross-domain (pedagogy + tech), flat requirements list

requirements.text: Deep understanding of learning science, cognitive load theory, and evidence-based pedagogy
Experience designing curriculum or instructional content for K-12 or higher education at scale
Comfort working with engineers and data scientists to translate pedagogical goals into product requirements
Experience with learning management systems (LMS) and content authoring tools
Familiarity with AI/ML concepts as applied to adaptive learning or intelligent tutoring systems
Experience with A/B testing or learning outcome measurement at scale
Master's degree in Education, Learning Sciences, Instructional Design, or related field
Passion for free, world-class education for anyone, anywhere

responsibilities: Design instructional frameworks for Khanmigo (AI tutor) interactions across math and science subjects
Collaborate with AI/ML engineers to define pedagogically-sound tutoring dialogue flows
Develop rubrics and evaluation criteria for AI-generated explanations and hints
Conduct learning outcome studies and iterate on content based on student performance data
Create instructor guides and training materials for teachers using Khanmigo in classrooms

expected_output.summary: Secondary school mathematics teacher with 8 years of classroom experience transitioning to instructional design. Led curriculum redesign for AP Calculus and AP Statistics at a 2,000-student high school using backward design and spaced repetition principles. Created supplementary digital learning modules on Khan Academy and Desmos. MEd in Curriculum & Instruction with thesis on adaptive practice platforms. Seeking to apply pedagogical expertise to AI-powered learning product design.

experience.company: Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology
experience.title: Mathematics Teacher & Curriculum Lead
bullets: Taught AP Calculus AB/BC and AP Statistics to 150+ students annually, achieving 92% pass rate (vs. 58% national average)
Led 4-person curriculum committee redesigning mathematics sequence using backward design and Understanding by Design (UbD) framework
Created 40+ supplementary video lessons (YouTube) and interactive practice sets (Desmos, Google Forms) aligned to Khan Academy exercise sequences
Piloted Khanmigo AI tutor in 3 AP Calculus sections (2023-2024), providing qualitative feedback to Khan Academy's product team
Trained 25 mathematics teachers across Fairfax County on integrating adaptive practice platforms (Khan Academy, Desmos, DeltaMath)

experience.title: Mathematics Teacher
bullets: Taught Algebra I, Geometry, and Pre-Calculus to diverse student population (35% ESL)
Designed differentiated instruction materials addressing 3 proficiency levels per class
Implemented formative assessment system using Google Forms and spreadsheet-based item analysis

certifications: College Board AP Summer Institute — Calculus AB/BC, Statistics
education: MEd Curriculum & Instruction — George Mason University (2019-2021, part-time)

jd_requirements: learning science cognitive load theory evidence-based pedagogy
curriculum instructional content K-12 higher education at scale
working with engineers data scientists pedagogical goals product requirements
learning management systems LMS content authoring tools
AI ML adaptive learning intelligent tutoring systems
A/B testing learning outcome measurement at scale
Master's Education Learning Sciences Instructional Design
deliberate_flaws: No professional instructional design experience — all teaching, not ID
No experience working with engineers or data scientists (only used products they built)
No A/B testing or quantitative learning outcome research experience
AI/ML knowledge is user-level only (piloted Khanmigo, didn't design tutoring flows)
No experience with content authoring tools beyond Google ecosystem and Khan Academy's platform
Career changer — no startup or tech company experience, moving from public school culture
Scale is classroom-level (150 students), not platform-level (millions of learners)

provenance.notes: Synthetic persona and JD. JD style modeled from real Greenhouse/Lever postings. Expected output and cloud_skills are AI-generated. 4/8 scorecard checks (jd_coverage, no_fabrication, metrics_preserved, no_fabricated_skills) evaluate AI vs AI reference. 4/8 checks (factual_preservation, word_count, ats_structure, action_verbs) are structurally valid regardless.
